job_description:
Job Title: Entry level AI Engineer

Responsibilities:
- Build and set up machine learning models for Natural Language Processing (NLP). [cite: 215]
- Work with AI models like BERT and GPT to handle different tasks. [cite: 216]
- Optimize models to ensure they respond quickly and efficiently. [cite: 217]
- Collaborate with the team to integrate AI into real applications. [cite: 218]

Requirements:
- Comfortable writing code in Python. [cite: 220]
- Familiarity with AI tools like PyTorch or Hugging Face. [cite: 221]
- Basic understanding of how computers process text (Arabic AI/AraBERT is a plus). [cite: 222]
- Ability to write clean and organized code. [cite: 223]

candidate_cv.career_overview: Software Engineer with 2 years in Web Developer specializing in front end development. [cite: 35] Proficient in Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) and SCRUM AGILE methodologies of development process to produce software solutions by team Involved in designing, planning, developing and implementing Microsoft.Net based solutions that meet quality and code standards. [cite: 36]

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology, Electrical and Electronics Engineering

responsibilities: Worked as Graduate Research Assistant performing the duties of Database Programmer/Analyst at Application Development Network (ADN), DoIT which supports University of Missouri System faculty and students through agile and rapid creation of new applications. [cite: 59, 60]
Created a Availability Calendar Grid where each cell represents time (1 hour span) and day of the week. [cite: 67, 68]
Automatically populated the course schedule which comes from different database developed C# Console Application for Scheduled email task. [cite: 70]
Created Class libraries out of the main project to access the database which can be used by both Console Application for Schedule task and web application. [cite: 72]
Developed a web interface for Administrators to upload the pdf files into database which can be viewed by students. [cite: 80]

Scrum Masters can estimate the length and cost to build the application (Project Estimator) based on number of developers, Sprint length, weeks of UAT etc which they can share with clients. [cite: 90]

Developed Application using AJAX controls like modal popup, ASP.Net server controls like listview, formview, worked on Clientside and Server side Validations and created Master Pages. [cite: 102, 103]
Created dynamic queries, stored procedures, Views and triggers in SQL server for the database manipulation. [cite: 107]

highlights: Strong experience in data retrieval and manipulation using ADO.Net data objects such as Dataset, Data Reader, Data list, Data Adaptor, Entity Frame work. [cite: 38]
Good experience in writing Class Library using C#, LINQ to SQL queries in Database Access layer to interface with SQL Database. [cite: 39]
Worked extensively with. Net Server Controls, Web User Controls, Data Grid, Web Control, Form Validation Controls and created Custom controls. [cite: 40]

scorecard.reason: The candidate provided vague and hypothetical answers, lacking specific evidence and proactive traits. [cite: 122]
detailed_report: The candidate's responses during the interview were not clear or detailed enough to assess their technical knowledge or behavioral evidence. [cite: 123]
They did not provide any specific examples or projects related to Python, artificial intelligence, or natural language processing. [cite: 123]
Additionally, they did not engage in the conversation about Linux commands or shell scripting, providing no context or evidence of their usage. [cite: 123]
Their answers were not in the STAR method format and lacked a proactive and methodical approach. [cite: 123]
The candidate's responses indicate a need for improvement in their ability to communicate their technical skills and experiences. [cite: 123]
